description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, with large floor-to-ceiling windows dominating the front and rear facades. The structure is surrounded by lush landscaping, including palm trees, shrubs, and manicured lawns, creating a private oasis. The front section includes a driveway and a small garden, while the rear opens to a spacious patio with outdoor seating and a pool area. The building is primarily constructed from concrete and glass, with metal accents and minimalistic detailing. The open-plan layout is visible through the expansive windows, suggesting a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing openness, light, and integration with nature.
description: A sleek, modern bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, and lush landscaping, featuring a pool and open patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and lush garden with palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, visible pool, patio, and extensive greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large glass windows, patio seating, and pool area, emphasizing indoor-outdoor flow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, rear landscaping, and the overall linear layout of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped floor-to-ceiling windows on front and rear facades
